{{Expand}}

{{Infobox icon
| name = The Open Eye
| introduced = Of Dawn and Darkness
}}

== Of Dawn and Darkness ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[The Open Eye]] is a silver medallion worn by members of a crowd.<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c11">''Of Dawn and Darkness'', chapter 11</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness|[[The Open Eye]] is not a [[Guild crest]] and stands for the [[Sleepless]].<ref name="ee-sea-02-of-dawn-and-darkness-c11" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Elder Empire nav}}

[[Category:Icons]]
[[Category:Of Dawn and Darkness]]
[[Category:Elder Empire]]
